user_request: Rite request: operation on long-range vox transmission
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on long-range vox transmission

### TOPIC
long-range vox transmission

### COMPONENT
long-range vox transmission

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- long-range vox transmission
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed be the long-range vox transmission, that carries the Emperor's word across the void!
Congregation: We invoke operation upon the long-range vox transmission, sanctify its crystalline matrices!
Priest: First, purge the corrupted signal pathways with sacred oils and incantations.
Congregation: Second, calibrate the resonance coils to harmonize with the Omnissiah's frequency.
Priest: Third, test the long-range vox transmission through blessed vocalizations, that no static shall impede our communion.

- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O signal encryption, ward of secrets most holy, protect the Emperor's communications!
Congregation: We beseech operation upon signal encryption, strengthen its ciphered ramparts!
Priest: First, invoke the Machine Spirit dwelling within the cryptographic core.
Congregation: Second, anoint signal encryption with blessed unguents, that no heretic may breach its mysteries.
Priest: Third, recalibrate the signal encryption's algorithmic lattices through meditative servo-prayer.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: noise requires reduction

### TOPIC
noise reduction

### COMPONENT
noise

### OPERATION
reduction

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- noise
- reduction

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hear us, Omnissiah, for noise doth corrupt our sacred instruments!
Congregation: Grant us reduction of this profane noise, cleanse the auditory channels!
Priest: First, identify the source of corruption within the noise-bearing mechanisms.
Congregation: Second, perform the sacred reduction upon the noise through dampening rituals and blessed wax-seals.
Priest: Third, verify the noise reduction hath achieved acceptable silence through reverent listening.

prayer:

Priest: First, cleanse the conveyor belt's rollers and bearings of accumulated detritus.
Congregation: Second, lubricate the conveyor belt with sacred machine-oils whilst chanting the Litany of Motion.
Priest: Third, engage the initialization sequence, bringing the conveyor belt to blessed operational velocity.

prayer:

Congregation: Grant operation to the manufactorum shift beginning, resurrect its productivity!
Priest: First, diagnose the mechanical failure within the manufactorum shift beginning's startup sequence.
Congregation: Second, anoint the manufactorum shift beginning with blessed lubricants and perform the Rite of Resumption.
Priest: Third, execute the operation cycle, restoring the manufactorum shift beginning to full operational tempo.
